item.title: Barcode Creator for Packaging [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Creator for Packaging [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Creator for Packaging
(Office Apps)
Company website www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com provides option to download Barcode Software for Packaging is specially used for making eye-catching bar code labels with line and text image designing objects. Barcode maker application enables packaging supplies business owners to create bar code tags using several types of image designing setting including size, color or font. Bar code labels creator program for packaging, supply and distribution industry offers solution to generate and print high resolution barcode stickers.
[read more]

item.title: How to Restore Data Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Restore Data Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
How to Restore Data Mac
(Utilities)
Recover Data Mac tool is specially deliberate to recuperate your missing precious events, digital photographs, beautiful memories, pictures from different types of digital cameras including point and shoot camera, Novelty camera, Compact digital camera, professional camera, digital video camera, Digital SLR camera and other types of digicams available in the market. Recover Data Mac for Apple Macintosh OS X offers distinctive technique for recuperating vanished picture files which are saved in any types of file formats regardless of their extensions. Recover Data Mac utility revive video, missing digital photographs and other memorable snapshots within least time. Application helps you to get back your missing digital photographs, images and other precious snapshots from inaccessible digicams. Recover Data software for MAC immediately recuperates your vanished video clips, memorable events and valuable snapshots from digital camera. Recover Data program for MAC has various competent features and options and you can easily download this advance tool from www.digitalcameraundelete.com. Recover Data Mac application facilitates an efficient tool for any photographers and digital camera users to promptly retrieve lost digital files of any extensions. Economical Recover Data Mac utility wonderfully regains lost digital photos at affordable prices. Recover Data Mac software absolutely get back your missing holiday photos, cute baby snapshots, precious images and more while your memory card is pulled out from your working digicam. User friendly Features:*Recover Data Mac tool uses diverse and inimitable means of retrieving your lost digital photographs, images. *Application supports amazing GUI interface so that non professional users can also operate the program without any experts guidance.

[read more]

item.title: Corporate Edition Barcode Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Corporate Edition Barcode Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Corporate Edition Barcode Software
(Office Apps)
Company suggests you to download Barcode Label Maker Software on Windows PC that allows users to generate multiple copies of labels, tags, coupons, stickers in different pattern and formats that suits your business needs. Barcode software also import barcode number series saved in .txt, .xls, .xlsx format as well as save generated barcodes in different image format for future use. Barcode labeling program consists of advance emailing settings helps to emailed all generated barcodes on single sheet of paper.
[read more]

Barcode software also import barcode number series saved in .txt, .xls, .xlsx format as well as save generated barcodes in different image format for future use. Barcode labeling program consists of advance emailing settings helps to emailed all generated barcodes on single sheet of paper.

item.title: GS NET OPTIMIZER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS NET OPTIMIZER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS NET OPTIMIZER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
In the world of online mobile gaming, every millisecond counts. Whether you're battling opponents in a fast-paced shooter or navigating intricate strategies in a multiplayer online game, a stable and low ping is crucial for success. Enter the GODSPEED Magisk Module developed by revWhiteShadow, a powerful tool designed to optimize your network connectivity and supercharge your mobile gaming experience.
The Need for Network Optimization in Gaming

Online gaming relies heavily on a stable internet connection. High ping times can lead to lag, delayed responses, and frustrating gameplay experiences. Gamers worldwide are constantly seeking ways to reduce their ping and maintain a competitive edge. This is where the GODSPEED Magisk Module comes into play.
What Is the GODSPEED Magisk Module?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module is a network optimization tool tailored specifically for Android devices. Developed by the talented coder revWhiteShadow, this module focuses on fine-tuning your network settings to ensure a smoother gaming experience.
Key Features:

Ping Optimization: The primary goal of the GODSPEED module is to reduce your ping times significantly. By fine-tuning network parameters and prioritizing gaming traffic, it helps ensure that your commands are executed in real-time.

Stability: It enhances network stability, reducing sudden spikes in ping that can disrupt your gameplay. This means fewer instances of rubber-banding or teleporting in-game.

Compatibility: The module is designed to work with a wide range of Android devices, making it accessible to a broad gaming community.

Ease of Use: Installation is relatively straightforward for those familiar with Magisk. After installing the module, you can customize its settings to suit your gaming preferences.

How Does It Work?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module optimizes your network by making subtle adjustments to your device's network settings. It prioritizes gaming traffic over other background processes and minimizes network latency. By ensuring that your device communicates more efficiently with game servers, it helps you achieve those low ping times essential for competitive gaming.
Installing the GODSPEED Magisk Module

Before you proceed with the installation, please keep in mind that using third-party modules like GODSPEED may affect your device's stability. Always follow proper backup procedures and proceed at your own risk.

Here are the general steps to install the GODSPEED Magisk Module:

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted and has Magisk installed.

Download the Module: Obtain the latest version of the GODSPEED Magisk Module from a trusted source.

Install the Module: Open the Magisk Manager app, go to the "Modules" section, and tap the "+" icon to install the module from your device's storage.

Reboot: Reboot your device to activate the GODSPEED module.

Customize Settings: After rebooting, you can access the module's settings to fine-tune its optimization to your liking.

Achieving Gaming Nirvana

For gamers seeking an edge in the competitive world of mobile gaming, the GODSPEED Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow offers a powerful solution. By optimizing network settings, reducing ping times, and enhancing overall network stability, it can help you achieve gaming nirvana with a ping that hovers between 10 to 100 milliseconds. However, always exercise caution when installing and configuring such modules, and remember to follow best practices for mobile device customization.

Give the GODSPEED Magisk Module a try, and may your victories be swift and your ping times ever low. Good luck, and game on!
[read more]

GS NET OPTIMIZER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
In the world of online mobile gaming, every millisecond counts. Whether you're battling opponents in a fast-paced shooter or navigating intricate strategies in a multiplayer online game, a stable and low ping is crucial for success. Enter the GODSPEED Magisk Module developed by revWhiteShadow, a powerful tool designed to optimize your network connectivity and supercharge your mobile gaming experience.

Gamers worldwide are constantly seeking ways to reduce their ping and maintain a competitive edge. This is where the GODSPEED Magisk Module comes into play.

However, always exercise caution when installing and configuring such modules, and remember to follow best practices for mobile device customization.

Give the GODSPEED Magisk Module a try, and may your victories be swift and your ping times ever low. Good luck, and game on!

GS NET OPTIMIZER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
In the world of online mobile gaming, every millisecond counts. Whether you're battling opponents in a fast-paced shooter or navigating intricate strategies in a multiplayer online game, a stable and low ping is crucial for success. Enter the GODSPEED Magisk Module developed by revWhiteShadow, a powerful tool designed to optimize your network connectivity and supercharge your mobile gaming experience.
The Need for Network Optimization in Gaming

Online gaming relies heavily on a stable internet connection. High ping times can lead to lag, delayed responses, and frustrating gameplay experiences. Gamers worldwide are constantly seeking ways to reduce their ping and maintain a competitive edge. This is where the GODSPEED Magisk Module comes into play.

item.title: Celeste Classic [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Celeste Classic [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Celeste Classic
(Jump N Run)
A hardcore platformer by Matt Thorson and Noel Berry, that authours made in 4 days.
They used pretty much all our resources for this. 8186/8192 code, the entire spritemap, the entire map, and 63/64 sounds.

Let us know what you think! :)

This is a C source port
[read more]
item.description:
Celeste Classic
(Jump N Run)

They used pretty much all our resources for this. 8186/8192 code, the entire spritemap, the entire map, and 63/64 sounds.

Let us know what you think! :)

item.content:encoded:

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
